ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of business unit (VB or VVB) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Country/region for the performance metric (US, UK, IT, FR, DE, JP) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific performance metric */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1-12) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (financial, operational, customer) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_unit_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type") REFERENCES units ("unit_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the business unit (VB or VVB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit's focus or operations */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent unit, if applicable */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the unit operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the business unit */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_parent_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, IT, FR, DE, JP) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region for financial metrics */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The actual year represented */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
